facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 857 reviews. One bowl of phở on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

Phở Hòa keeps showing up on locals' lists and it earns every star. The broth hits different when you're eating where the neighborhood actually eats, not where the resort pointed you.

Phu Quoc has no shortage of tourist traps. This isn't one of them.
